tEn: SGLang: Efficient Execution of Structured Language Model Programs
tZh: SGLang：结构化语言模型程序的高效执行
sEn: SGLang achieves up to 6.4x higher throughput than state-of-the-art systems for complex LLM programs.
sZh: SGLang 在复杂语言模型程序上实现了高达 6.4 倍的吞吐量提升。
absEn: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for complex tasks that require multiple generation calls, advanced prompting techniques, control flow, and structured inputs/outputs. However, efficient systems are lacking for programming and executing these applications. We introduce SGLang, a system for efficient execution of complex language model programs. SGLang consists of a frontend language and a runtime. The frontend simplifies programming with primitives for generation and parallelism control. The runtime accelerates execution with novel optimizations like RadixAttention for KV cache reuse and compressed finite state machines for faster structured output decoding. Experiments show that SGLang achieves up to 6.4x higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art inference systems on various large language and multi-modal models on tasks including agent control, logical reasoning, few-shot learning benchmarks, JSON decoding, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines, and multi-turn chat. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang
absZh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地用于需要多次生成调用、高级提示技术、控制流和结构化输入/输出的复杂任务。然而，目前缺乏高效的编程和执行系统来支持这些应用。我们提出了 SGLang，一个用于高效执行复杂语言模型程序的系统。SGLang 包含一个前端语言和一个运行时。前端通过提供生成和并行控制的原语简化了编程。运行时通过新颖的优化加速执行，例如用于 KV 缓存重用的 RadixAttention 和用于更快结构化输出解码的压缩有限状态机。实验表明，在包括智能体控制、逻辑推理、少样本学习基准、JSON 解码、检索增强生成管道和多轮对话等任务上，SGLang 在各种大型语言和多模态模型上实现了高达 6.4 倍的吞吐量提升，相比最先进的推理系统。代码已在 https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang 公开。

contrib.en: Proposes SGLang, a domain-specific language with primitives for LLM programming, supporting parallelism, control flow, nested calls, and external calls.
contrib.zh: 提出SGLang，一种具有LLM编程原语的领域特定语言，支持并行、控制流、嵌套调用和外部调用。

contrib.en: Develops an interpreter that executes SGLang programs with Python, managing prompt states as asynchronous streams for intra-program parallelism.
contrib.zh: 开发了一个与Python协同执行SGLang程序的解释器，将提示状态作为异步流管理，实现程序内并行。

contrib.en: Builds a compiler that compiles SGLang programs into computational graphs, enabling classical compiler optimizations like code movement and prefetching.
contrib.zh: 构建了一个编译器，将SGLang程序编译为计算图，支持代码移动和预取等经典编译器优化。

contrib.en: Introduces RadixAttention, a novel technique for automatic KV cache reuse across multiple generation calls using a radix tree with LRU eviction.
contrib.zh: 引入RadixAttention，一种通过带LRU淘汰的基数树在多次生成调用间自动复用KV缓存的新技术。

contrib.en: Demonstrates up to 6.4x throughput improvement over state-of-the-art inference systems on diverse LLM tasks including agents, reasoning, and JSON decoding.
contrib.zh: 在包括智能体、推理和JSON解码等多种LLM任务上，相比最先进的推理系统实现了高达6.4倍的吞吐量提升。

contrib.en: Shows productivity gains with 55% fewer lines of code compared to OpenAI APIs for complex prompting flows.
contrib.zh: 在复杂提示流程中，相比OpenAI API，代码行数减少55%，展示了生产力提升。

limits.en: Tracing and compiler lack support for data-dependent control flows, limiting compilation to programs without dynamic branches.
limits.zh: 追踪和编译器缺乏对数据依赖控制流的支持，将编译限制在没有动态分支的程序上。

limits.en: Current tokenization algorithm may create artifacts at prompt and generation boundaries, requiring token healing for resolution.
limits.zh: 当前分词算法可能在提示和生成边界产生伪影，需要令牌修复来解决。

limits.en: Grammar-constrained decoding is not yet implemented, requiring future integration of efficient techniques and careful batching.
limits.zh: 尚未实现语法约束解码，需要未来集成高效技术和仔细的批处理。

limits.en: The system has not been tested on extremely large models (e.g., 100B+ parameters) or distributed settings, limiting scalability claims.
limits.zh: 系统尚未在超大模型（如100B+参数）或分布式设置上测试，限制了可扩展性声明。

limits.en: Compiler optimizations using GPT-4 for code movement are not fully reliable, with failures in understanding semantic meaning in some cases.
limits.zh: 使用GPT-4进行代码移动的编译器优化并非完全可靠，在某些情况下无法正确理解语义。

items.en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for complex tasks requiring multiple chained generation calls, advanced prompting techniques, control flow, and interaction with external environments. However, efficient systems for programming and executing these applications are lacking. To bridge this gap, we introduce SGLang, a Structured Generation Language for LLMs. SGLang is designed for the efficient programming of LLMs and incorporates primitives for common LLM programming patterns. We have implemented SGLang as a domain-specific language embedded in Python, and we developed an interpreter, a compiler, and a high-performance runtime for SGLang. These components work together to enable optimizations such as parallelism, batching, caching, sharing, and other compilation techniques. Additionally, we propose RadixAttention, a novel technique that maintains a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache of the Key-Value (KV) cache for all requests in a radix tree, enabling automatic KV cache reuse across multiple generation calls at runtime. SGLang simplifies the writing of LLM programs and boosts execution efficiency. Our experiments demonstrate that SGLang can speed up common LLM tasks by up to 5×5\times, while reducing code complexity and enhancing control.
items.zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地用于需要多次链式生成调用、高级提示技术、控制流以及与外部环境交互的复杂任务。然而，缺乏用于编程和执行这些应用的高效系统。为弥补这一差距，我们引入了SGLang，一种用于LLM的结构化生成语言。SGLang专为LLM的高效编程而设计，并包含了常见LLM编程模式的原语。我们将SGLang实现为嵌入Python的领域特定语言，并开发了SGLang的解释器、编译器和高性能运行时。这些组件协同工作，支持并行、批处理、缓存、共享及其他编译技术等优化。此外，我们提出了RadixAttention，一种新颖的技术，它在基数树中维护所有请求的键值（KV）缓存的最近最少使用（LRU）缓存，从而在运行时实现跨多个生成调用的自动KV缓存重用。SGLang简化了LLM程序的编写并提高了执行效率。我们的实验表明，SGLang可以将常见LLM任务的速度提升高达5倍，同时降低代码复杂度并增强控制。

items.en: Recent increases in the capabilities of LLMs have broadened their utility, enabling them to tackle a wider range of general tasks and act as autonomous agents [40, 6, 42, 61]. In such applications, LLMs engage in multi-round planning, reasoning, and interaction with external environments. This is accomplished through tool usage [49], multiple input modalities [1], and a wide-range of prompting techniques [31], like few-shot learning [5], self-consistency [63], skeleton-of-thought [37], and tree-of-thought [70]. All of these new use cases require multiple, often dependent, LLM generation calls, and critically, the control flow of these programs may depend on the output of LLMs [71]. The emergence of these complex patterns signifies a shift in our interaction with LLMs, moving from simple turn-based chatting to a more sophisticated form of programmatic usage of LLMs (see Section 2.2). Figure 1 shows an example of such an LLM program, where multiple generation calls are used to accomplish a task. The example uses SGLang, a new domain-specific language we introduce in this paper and explain in Section 4.
items.zh: 最近LLM能力的提升拓宽了其用途，使其能够处理更广泛的通用任务并充当自主智能体[40, 6, 42, 61]。在此类应用中，LLM参与多轮规划、推理以及与外部环境的交互。这通过工具使用[49]、多种输入模态[1]以及广泛的提示技术[31]（如少样本学习[5]、自一致性[63]、思维骨架[37]和思维树[70]）来实现。所有这些新用例都需要多次（通常是依赖的）LLM生成调用，并且关键的是，这些程序的控制流可能取决于LLM的输出[71]。这些复杂模式的出现标志着我们与LLM交互方式的转变，从简单的轮流聊天转向更复杂的LLM程序化使用（见第2.2节）。图1展示了这样一个LLM程序的示例，其中使用多次生成调用来完成一项任务。该示例使用了SGLang，这是我们在本文中介绍并在第4节解释的一种新的领域特定语言。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The implementation of a multi-dimensional essay judge in SGLang utilizes the branch-solve-merge prompting technique [48]. This function uses LLMs to evaluate the quality of an essay from multiple dimensions, merges the judgments, generates a summary, and assigns a final grade. The highlighted regions illustrate the use of SGLang APIs. (1) fork creates multiple parallel copies of a prompt. (2) gen invokes an LLM generation and stores the result in a variable. (3) [variable_name] retrieves the result of the generation. (4) choices imposes constraints on the generation. (5) run executes a SGLang function with its arguments.
items.capZh: 图1：在SGLang中实现的多维论文评判器使用了分支-求解-合并提示技术[48]。该函数使用LLM从多个维度评估论文质量，合并评判结果，生成摘要，并给出最终评分。高亮区域展示了SGLang API的使用。(1) fork创建多个并行的提示副本。(2) gen调用LLM生成并将结果存储在变量中。(3) [variable_name]检索生成结果。(4) choices对生成施加约束。(5) run执行带有参数的SGLang函数。

items.en: To align with emerging trends, the community has seen the development and rising popularity of new interfaces such as LangChain [24], LMQL [4], Guidance [16], and DSPy [21]. These tools help users manage prompt templates and program pipelines with ease. However, their primary focus on front-end design often results in compromised runtime performance.
items.zh: 为了顺应新兴趋势，社区已经开发并普及了新的接口，如LangChain [24]、LMQL [4]、Guidance [16]和DSPy [21]。这些工具有助于用户轻松管理提示模板和程序流水线。然而，它们主要关注前端设计，往往导致运行时性能受损。

items.en: Conversely, while back-end inference engines like NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM [38], Hugging Face TGI [19], Orca [74], and vLLM [23] continue to reduce latency and improve throughput, their design largely remains anchored in traditional single-generation call interfaces. They typically support APIs similar to the OpenAI Completion API [39], where a user prompt is processed and a response is returned in a stateless manner.
items.zh: 相反，虽然后端推理引擎如NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM [38]、Hugging Face TGI [19]、Orca [74]和vLLM [23]不断降低延迟并提高吞吐量，但它们的设计在很大程度上仍固守传统的单次生成调用接口。它们通常支持类似于OpenAI Completion API [39]的API，其中用户提示被处理并以无状态方式返回响应。

items.en: While both front-end and back-end technologies are advancing rapidly, they are evolving along separate trajectories. The front end largely remains oblivious to the LLM inference processes, while the back end often lacks awareness of the application’s structure and is unable to optimize across multiple calls. This disjointed development leads to numerous missed opportunities for performance optimization, such as KV cache sharing and parallelism, as discussed in Section 2.3.
items.zh: 尽管前端和后端技术都在快速发展，但它们沿着不同的轨迹演进。前端在很大程度上仍然对LLM推理过程一无所知，而后端通常缺乏对应用程序结构的感知，无法跨多个调用进行优化。这种脱节的发展导致了许多性能优化机会的丧失，例如KV缓存共享和并行性，如第2.3节所述。

items.en: In this paper, we present a holistic approach for an efficient LLM programming system by co-designing both the front-end language and the back-end runtime. The process involves three key challenges: (i) creating a flexible, domain-specific language with primitives suitable for LLM programming and ecosystem integration; (ii) ensuring efficient program execution via automatic parallelism, batching, caching, and sharing across multiple calls and multiple programs; and (iii) enhancing program performance through compiler optimizations like code movement and prefetching annotations.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们通过协同设计前端语言和后端运行时，提出了一种用于高效LLM编程系统的整体方法。该过程涉及三个关键挑战：(i) 创建一种灵活的领域特定语言，具有适合LLM编程和生态系统集成的原语；(ii) 通过跨多个调用和多个程序的自动并行、批处理、缓存和共享，确保高效的程序执行；(iii) 通过编译器优化（如代码移动和预取注释）提升程序性能。

items.en: On the front end, we introduce SGLang, a domain-specific language embedded in Python. It provides a set of primitives specifically designed to facilitate programming LLMs. These primitives enable the manipulation of prompts and generations (e.g., extend, gen, select) and the control of parallelism (e.g., fork, join). Furthermore, SGLang is compatible with Python’s control flow and libraries. Leveraging these primitives along with native Python syntax, users can intuitively develop sophisticated prompting strategies and agents, while obviating the need for manual optimization. Moreover, the unified language enhances portability, enabling users to transition easily between different open-source and proprietary models, such as those from OpenAI and Anthropic.
items.zh: 在前端，我们引入了SGLang，一种嵌入Python的领域特定语言。它提供了一组专门设计用于促进LLM编程的原语。这些原语支持提示和生成的操作（例如，extend、gen、select）以及并行的控制（例如，fork、join）。此外，SGLang与Python的控制流和库兼容。利用这些原语以及原生Python语法，用户可以直观地开发复杂的提示策略和智能体，同时无需手动优化。此外，统一的语言增强了可移植性，使用户能够轻松地在不同的开源和专有模型（如OpenAI和Anthropic的模型）之间切换。

items.en: We develop both an interpreter and a compiler for SGLang. The interpreter is responsible for managing the prompt state and executing SGLang programs. Specifically, it treats a prompt as a stream and submits primitive operations to this stream for asynchronous execution, ensuring proper control over synchronization and intra-program parallelism. Additionally, we can trace a SGLang program and utilize the compiler to compile it into a computational graph. This approach opens opportunities for more aggressive optimizations. We explore several classical compiler optimizations, e.g., code movement, in the context of LLM programming.
items.zh: 我们为SGLang开发了解释器和编译器。解释器负责管理提示状态并执行SGLang程序。具体来说，它将提示视为流，并将原语操作提交到此流以进行异步执行，确保对同步和程序内并行的适当控制。此外，我们可以跟踪SGLang程序，并利用编译器将其编译为计算图。这种方法为更激进的优化提供了机会。我们探索了在LLM编程背景下的几种经典编译器优化，例如代码移动。

items.en: On the back end, we propose a novel technique called RadixAttention to automatically reuse the KV cache across multiple generation calls. In existing systems, the KV cache of a request is discarded after processing is completed, which prevents KV cache from being reused across multiple generation calls. Instead, our system maintains an LRU cache of the KV cache for all requests within a radix tree. This approach allows the runtime to efficiently achieve automatic sharing for various reuse patterns. Additionally, to increase the cache hit rate, we utilize a cache-aware scheduling policy.
items.zh: 在后端，我们提出了一种名为RadixAttention的新技术，用于在多个生成调用之间自动重用KV缓存。在现有系统中，请求的KV缓存在处理完成后被丢弃，这阻止了KV缓存在多个生成调用之间的重用。相反，我们的系统在基数树中维护所有请求的KV缓存的LRU缓存。这种方法允许运行时针对各种重用模式高效地实现自动共享。此外，为了提高缓存命中率，我们采用了缓存感知的调度策略。

items.en: In summary, we make the following contributions:
items.zh: 总之，我们做出了以下贡献：

items.en: We present SGLang, a domain-specific language with primitives for LLM programming, supporting parallelism, control flow, nested calls, and external calls.
items.zh: 我们提出了SGLang，一种具有LLM编程原语的领域特定语言，支持并行、控制流、嵌套调用和外部调用。

items.en: We develop an interpreter capable of executing SGLang programs in tandem with the Python interpreter and managing prompt states as asynchronous streams.
items.zh: 我们开发了一个解释器，能够与Python解释器协同执行SGLang程序，并将提示状态作为异步流进行管理。

items.en: We build a compiler capable of compiling programs into computational graphs and explore classical compiler techniques in the context of LLM programming.
items.zh: 我们构建了一个编译器，能够将程序编译为计算图，并在LLM编程背景下探索经典编译器技术。

items.en: We propose RadixAttention, a novel technique for automatic KV cache reuse across multiple generation calls at runtime.
items.zh: 我们提出了RadixAttention，一种在运行时跨多个生成调用自动重用KV缓存的新颖技术。

items.en: Using SGLang, we implement various LLM applications, including agent control, logical reasoning, content generation, benchmarking, and long document processing. Our experiments demonstrate that SGLang can accelerate common LLM tasks by up to 5×5\times, while reducing code complexity and enhancing control.
items.zh: 使用SGLang，我们实现了各种LLM应用，包括智能体控制、逻辑推理、内容生成、基准测试和长文档处理。我们的实验表明，SGLang可以将常见LLM任务的速度提升高达5倍，同时降低代码复杂度并增强控制。

full.secZh: 2.1 大语言模型的推理过程

items.en: Most LLMs in use today, such as GPT-3 [5], PaLM [8], and LLaMA [58], are based on the autoregressive Transformer architecture [60]. The models predict the probability of the next token in a sequence based on the preceding tokens. During inference, the model first processes a sequence of input tokens through a forward pass. It then sequentially decodes output tokens, with each token depending on prior tokens. We refer to the process of taking a sequence of input tokens and generating a sequence of output tokens as a single generation call. Throughout this process, each token generates some intermediate tensors, which are used for decoding further tokens. These intermediate tensors, known as the "KV Cache", are named for the key-value pairs in the self-attention mechanism. An observation that will be important when discussing optimizations later is that the computation of the KV cache only depends on all previous tokens, so different sequences with the same prefix can reuse the KV cache of the prefix tokens and avoid redundant computation.
items.zh: 当今使用的大多数LLM，如GPT-3 [5]、PaLM [8]和LLaMA [58]，都基于自回归Transformer架构[60]。这些模型根据前面的词元预测序列中下一个词元的概率。在推理过程中，模型首先通过前向传播处理输入词元序列。然后它顺序解码输出词元，每个词元依赖于前面的词元。我们将输入词元序列并生成输出词元序列的过程称为单次生成调用。在整个过程中，每个词元生成一些中间张量，这些张量用于解码后续词元。这些中间张量被称为“KV缓存”，以自注意力机制中的键值对命名。在后续讨论优化时，一个重要的观察是：KV缓存的计算仅依赖于所有前面的词元，因此具有相同前缀的不同序列可以重用前缀词元的KV缓存，避免冗余计算。

full.secZh: 2.2 编程大语言模型的范式

items.en: As LLMs become more powerful, they are increasingly employed as versatile task solvers in complex systems. In these contexts, it is imperative that LLMs operate as dependable and intelligent components. This evolves the use of LLMs from single, straightforward generation calls to multiple, interdependent generation calls interleaved with control flow, leading to the emergence of the "Programming LLMs" paradigm. Programming LLMs refers to the development of computer programs that control the generation processes of LLMs. This concept can be exemplified in several ways.
items.zh: 随着LLM变得更加强大，它们越来越多地被用作复杂系统中的通用任务求解器。在这些背景下，LLM必须作为可靠且智能的组件运行。这促使LLM的使用从单一、简单的生成调用演变为多次、相互依赖的生成调用与控制流交织，从而催生了“编程LLM”范式。编程LLM指的是开发控制LLM生成过程的计算机程序。这个概念可以通过几种方式体现。

items.en: First, advanced prompting techniques are examples of programming LLMs. An exemplary case is meta-reasoning [73]. To solve a problem, the LLM initially generates multiple solutions through chain-of-thought prompting. It then performs meta-reasoning across these solutions to derive the final resolution. Another example is skeleton-of-thought [37]. To answer a question, the LLM first generates a skeleton of the answer. It then issues multiple parallel calls to elaborate the skeleton into a detailed explanation. A more complex case is the tree-of-thought approach [70], which integrates LLM calls within tree search algorithms (e.g., breadth-first search).
items.zh: 首先，高级提示技术是编程LLM的示例。一个典型的例子是元推理[73]。为了解决问题，LLM最初通过思维链提示生成多个解决方案。然后它对这些解决方案进行元推理以得出最终答案。另一个例子是思维骨架[37]。为了回答问题，LLM首先生成答案的骨架。然后它发出多个并行调用来将骨架扩展为详细解释。一个更复杂的例子是思维树方法[70]，它将LLM调用集成到树搜索算法（例如广度优先搜索）中。

items.en: Second, in LLM-based agents, the programmatic use of LLMs is crucial. Take the ReAct agent [71], for example. The behavior of the agent is controlled by loops and conditional statements. The agent performs one action per iteration. In each iteration, the agent chooses the action type (search or finish), generates action parameters, and processes observations from the external environment.
items.zh: 其次，在基于LLM的智能体中，LLM的程序化使用至关重要。以ReAct智能体[71]为例。智能体的行为由循环和条件语句控制。智能体每次迭代执行一个动作。在每次迭代中，智能体选择动作类型（搜索或完成），生成动作参数，并处理来自外部环境的观察。

items.en: Third, simpler prompting forms also fall under the scope of programming LLMs. Techniques like few-shot prompting [5], chain-of-thought prompting [64], and retrieval-augmented generation [26] are basic elements in programming LLMs.
items.zh: 第三，更简单的提示形式也属于编程大语言模型的范畴。少样本提示[5]、思维链提示[64]和检索增强生成[26]等技术是编程大语言模型的基本元素。

items.capEn: Figure 2: KV cache sharing examples. Blue boxes represent shareable prompt parts, green boxes indicate non-shareable parts, and yellow boxes mark non-shareable model outputs. Shareable elements include few-shot learning examples, questions in self-consistency [63], chat history in multi-turn chats, and search history in tree-of-thought [70].
items.capZh: 图2：KV缓存共享示例。蓝色框表示可共享的提示部分，绿色框表示不可共享的部分，黄色框表示不可共享的模型输出。可共享元素包括少样本学习示例、自一致性[63]中的问题、多轮对话中的聊天历史以及思维树[70]中的搜索历史。

items.en: Designing programming systems for LLMs presents unique challenges and opportunities. A good system should help a programmer be productive, offering an intuitive and expressive interface for common programming tasks, including LLM state management, decoding process control, and smooth integration with external tools. Furthermore, it is essential to ensure performance by optimizing for low latency and high throughput execution. In particular, the rich structure of LLM programs and the unique properties of LLM inference provide plenty of opportunities for runtime optimizations. These include:
items.zh: 为大语言模型设计编程系统带来了独特的挑战和机遇。一个好的系统应帮助程序员提高生产力，为常见编程任务提供直观且富有表现力的接口，包括大语言模型状态管理、解码过程控制以及与外部工具的无缝集成。此外，通过优化以实现低延迟和高吞吐量执行来确保性能至关重要。特别是，大语言模型程序的丰富结构和大语言模型推理的独特属性为运行时优化提供了大量机会。这些包括：

items.en: Caching: Often in LLM programs, multiple text segments and generation calls are appended to a single prompt. Caching the computed KV cache for previous tokens across multiple chained calls can reduce redundant computation. This optimization, however, is neither free nor trivial, as it requires additional storage and more complex memory management.
items.zh: 缓存：在大语言模型程序中，多个文本片段和生成调用通常被附加到单个提示中。跨多个链式调用缓存先前词元的计算KV缓存可以减少冗余计算。然而，这种优化既不是免费的也不是微不足道的，因为它需要额外的存储和更复杂的内存管理。

items.en: Batching: The decoding process in LLMs is primarily memory-bound, meaning increasing the batch size can significantly enhance throughput. Running a large number of LLM programs in a batch, and utilizing the contiguous batching technique [74] can be beneficial.
items.zh: 批处理：大语言模型中的解码过程主要是内存受限的，这意味着增加批大小可以显著提高吞吐量。批量运行大量大语言模型程序，并利用连续批处理技术[74]可能是有益的。

items.en: Sharing: It is common in LLM programs to generate multiple outputs from a single prompt or to fork a new prompt from the current state. Basic prefix sharing has been investigated in vLLM [23]. More advanced sharing patterns like irregular tree-structured sharing can also be employed. Figure 2 shows four typical patterns of KV cache sharing across multiple calls; none of the existing systems can automatically handle all of them.
items.zh: 共享：在大语言模型程序中，从单个提示生成多个输出或从当前状态分叉新提示是很常见的。vLLM[23]已经研究了基本的前缀共享。还可以采用更高级的共享模式，如不规则的树状结构共享。图2显示了跨多个调用的KV缓存共享的四种典型模式；现有系统都无法自动处理所有这些模式。

items.en: Parallelism: An LLM program often includes multiple generation calls. By creating a dependency graph for these calls, we can identify independent calls and execute them in parallel. This creates intra-program parallelism, which adds additional parallelism to the straightforward inter-program parallelism. For example, in Figure 1, the generation of multiple judgments can be parallelized.
items.zh: 并行性：大语言模型程序通常包含多个生成调用。通过为这些调用创建依赖图，我们可以识别独立调用并并行执行它们。这创建了程序内并行性，为直接的跨程序并行性增加了额外的并行性。例如，在图1中，多个判断的生成可以并行化。

items.en: Compilation: Once a full program is available, it can be compiled into an optimized intermediate representation for more efficient execution. More aggressive optimizations can also be implemented, such as automatically adjusting the original prompts based on user-provided test cases. These optimizations may include expanding, compressing, rearranging parts of the prompts, and selecting different models for different calls.
items.zh: 编译：一旦完整的程序可用，它可以被编译为优化的中间表示以实现更高效的执行。还可以实现更激进的优化，例如根据用户提供的测试用例自动调整原始提示。这些优化可能包括扩展、压缩、重新排列提示的部分，以及为不同调用选择不同模型。

items.en: To systematically explore these opportunities, it is essential to co-design the programming interface and runtime. However, inference engines like Orca and vLLM fall short, as they optimize only for single generation calls. This limitation leads to redundant computations and missed opportunities when executing LLM programs that involve multiple calls.
items.zh: 为了系统地探索这些机会，编程接口和运行时的协同设计至关重要。然而，像Orca和vLLM这样的推理引擎存在不足，因为它们仅针对单个生成调用进行优化。这种限制导致在执行涉及多个调用的大语言模型程序时出现冗余计算和错失机会。

full.secZh: 2.4 现有的大语言模型编程系统

items.en: Given the significance of LLM programming, specialized programming systems have been developed. The top layer comprises high-level application development libraries with pre-built modules, such as LangChain [24]. The middle layer features more flexible pipeline programming frameworks like DSPy [21]. At the bottom layer, there are domain-specific languages designed for controlling a single prompt, including LMQL [4] and Guidance [16].
items.zh: 鉴于大语言模型编程的重要性，已经开发了专门的编程系统。顶层是带有预构建模块的高级应用开发库，如LangChain[24]。中间层是更灵活的流水线编程框架，如DSPy[21]。底层是用于控制单个提示的领域特定语言，包括LMQL[4]和Guidance[16]。

items.en: SGLang, uniquely positioned between the middle and bottom layers, shares similarities with LMQL and Guidance. However, unlike LMQL and Guidance, which primarily focus on language design while often overlooking runtime efficiency, SGLang thoughtfully integrates front-end language features with back-end runtime optimizations. This approach significantly enhances runtime efficiency, sometimes by an order of magnitude or more. For its front-end, LMQL employs an SQL-like custom syntax, contrasting with the more intuitive Python syntax. Guidance initially used the Handlebars template language and later transitioned to a Pythonic language embedded within Python. The front-end language of SGLang, inspired by Guidance, is being developed concurrently with the new version of Guidance.
items.zh: SGLang独特地定位在中间层和底层之间，与LMQL和Guidance有相似之处。然而，与LMQL和Guidance主要关注语言设计而常常忽视运行时效率不同，SGLang深思熟虑地将前端语言特性与后端运行时优化相结合。这种方法显著提高了运行时效率，有时甚至提高一个数量级或更多。对于其前端，LMQL采用类似SQL的自定义语法，与更直观的Python语法形成对比。Guidance最初使用Handlebars模板语言，后来过渡到嵌入在Python中的Python风格语言。SGLang的前端语言受Guidance启发，正在与Guidance的新版本同时开发。

items.en: SGLang introduces new primitives for enhanced expressiveness and runtime efficiency. It also offers the flexibility of both interpreter and compiler modes. A comparison among LMQL, Guidance, and SGLang is presented in Table 1. We omit the comparison with LangChain and DSPy because they are at a higher level. It is possible to compile high-level pipelines from LangChain and DSPy to SGLang.
items.zh: SGLang引入了新的原语以增强表达能力和运行时效率。它还提供了解释器和编译器两种模式的灵活性。LMQL、Guidance和SGLang之间的比较见表1。我们省略了与LangChain和DSPy的比较，因为它们处于更高层次。可以将LangChain和DSPy的高级流水线编译为SGLang。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The overview of the system.

items.en: SGLang is implemented as an embedded domain-specific language in Python.
items.zh: SGLang作为嵌入在Python中的领域特定语言实现。

items.en: These examples illustrate the use of SGLang. In SGLang, we provide the following primitives: gen for calling LLM generation, select for letting the LLM choose the option with the highest probability from a list, += or extend for extending the current prompt, fork for forking the current prompt state, and join for rejoining the forked prompt states. Users can interleave these primitives with arbitrary Python control flow and libraries.
items.zh: 这些示例说明了SGLang的使用。在SGLang中，我们提供以下原语：gen用于调用大语言模型生成，select用于让大语言模型从列表中选择概率最高的选项，+=或extend用于扩展当前提示，fork用于分叉当前提示状态，join用于重新合并分叉的提示状态。用户可以将这些原语与任意Python控制流和库交错使用。

items.en: The most basic way to execute a SGLang program is through an interpreter. In SGLang, a prompt is treated as an asynchronous stream. Executing primitives such as extend, gen, and select on a prompt leads to the interpreter submitting these primitives into the stream for asynchronous execution. These submission calls are non-blocking, allowing the Python interpreter to continue executing Python code without waiting for the LLM generation to finish. This process is akin to launching CUDA kernels to CUDA streams asynchronously. Each prompt is managed by a stream executor in a background thread, enabling users to achieve parallelism.
items.zh: 执行SGLang程序最基本的方式是通过解释器。在SGLang中，提示被视为异步流。在提示上执行诸如extend、gen和select等原语会导致解释器将这些原语提交到流中以进行异步执行。这些提交调用是非阻塞的，允许Python解释器继续执行Python代码，而无需等待大语言模型生成完成。这个过程类似于将CUDA内核异步启动到CUDA流中。每个提示由后台线程中的流执行器管理，使用户能够实现并行性。

items.en: When fetching the generation results from a prompt, the fetch action will be blocked until the desired generation results are ready. This is implemented using event mechanisms, where a generation call sets an event upon producing its output. Thus, the interpreter effectively manages intra-program parallelism and synchronization.
items.zh: 当从提示中获取生成结果时，获取操作将被阻塞，直到所需的生成结果准备就绪。这是通过事件机制实现的，其中生成调用在产生输出时设置一个事件。因此，解释器有效地管理程序内并行性和同步。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The SGLang program for parallel tip suggestion with skeleton-of-thought prompting.
items.capZh: 图4：使用思维骨架提示进行并行提示建议的SGLang程序。

items.capEn: Figure 5: A computational graph for the program in Figure 4. The three streams correspond to three function calls.
items.capZh: 图5：图4中程序的计算图。三个流对应三个函数调用。

items.en: Another way to run SGLang programs is to compile them as computational graphs and run them with a graph executor. This opens the opportunity for more compilation optimizations, as we can rewrite the graph.
items.zh: 运行SGLang程序的另一种方式是将其编译为计算图并使用图执行器运行。这为更多的编译优化提供了机会，因为我们可以重写图。

items.en: We design an intermediate representation (IR) for SGLang, representing SGLang program structures and operations as a computational graph. This graph includes nodes for primitive operators and edges for dependencies. See Figure 5 for the graph corresponding to the program in Figure 4. In the program, each call to a decorated function and or fork will create a new prompt state, or a stream.
items.zh: 我们为 SGLang 设计了一种中间表示（IR），将 SGLang 程序结构和操作表示为计算图。该图包含基本运算符的节点和依赖关系的边。图 5 展示了与图 4 中程序对应的图。在程序中，每次调用装饰函数或 fork 都会创建一个新的提示状态或流。

items.en: There are several types of nodes. Each operand of += and + in a SGLang program is represented by an IR node. These include ConstantText, Argument, Gen, Select, Variable, Fork, GetForkItem, and Join. There are two types of dependencies. The first is intra-stream dependency, where operations submitted into a stream using += must be executed after all preceding operations in that stream. The second is inter-stream dependency, which occurs when one stream needs to fetch variable values from another stream, necessitating synchronization. Operations like fork manipulate multiple streams and thus introduce inter-stream dependencies.
items.zh: 有几种类型的节点。SGLang 程序中每个 += 和 + 的操作数都由一个 IR 节点表示。这些节点包括 ConstantText、Argument、Gen、Select、Variable、Fork、GetForkItem 和 Join。依赖关系有两种类型。第一种是流内依赖，即使用 += 提交到流中的操作必须在该流中所有先前操作之后执行。第二种是流间依赖，当一个流需要从另一个流获取变量值时发生，需要同步。像 fork 这样的操作会操作多个流，因此会引入流间依赖。

items.en: To generate the graph, we use tracing to run the program with abstract arguments and construct the graph dynamically. This method is limited to programs without data-dependent control flow, a limitation we plan to address in future work. Once constructed, the graph can be executed through a graph executor, eliminating the need to reinterpret the original Python program. This results in benefits like graph rewriting optimizations, reduced runtime overhead, and program serialization. For execution, stream executors are launched for each data stream, dispatching IR nodes to the streams in topological order.
items.zh: 为了生成图，我们使用追踪技术，用抽象参数运行程序并动态构建图。这种方法仅限于没有数据依赖控制流的程序，我们计划在未来工作中解决这一限制。图构建完成后，可以通过图执行器执行，无需重新解释原始 Python 程序。这带来了图重写优化、减少运行时开销和程序序列化等好处。执行时，为每个数据流启动流执行器，按拓扑顺序将 IR 节点分派到流中。

items.en: We explore two compilation optimizations for SGLang IR. The first one is noteworthy as it integrates GPT-4 into compiler optimization processes. The second one is more conventional. We anticipate more classical compiler techniques can also be applied, such as auto-tuning and instruction selection.
items.zh: 我们探索了 SGLang IR 的两种编译优化。第一种值得注意，因为它将 GPT-4 集成到编译器优化过程中。第二种更为传统。我们预计还可以应用更多经典的编译器技术，例如自动调优和指令选择。

items.en: Code Movement for Improving Prefix Sharing. This optimization aims to improve prefix sharing by reordering nodes in the graph to increase the length of the constant prefix. It does not strictly preserve the original computation, classifying it as an aggressive optimization. For instance, changing the prompt from “Here is a question + {question}. Please act as a math expert and solve the given question” to “Please act as a math expert and solve the given question. Here is a question + {question}.” results in a longer sharable prefix. This optimization is interesting because traditional program analysis cannot achieve it, due to the presence of natural language instructions in SGLang. Instead, we prompt GPT-4 to reorder graph nodes. We write a prompt with several examples to teach GPT-4 the concepts of SGLang IR, and we find that GPT-4 can successfully apply this optimization for some simple SGLang programs.
items.zh: 用于改进前缀共享的代码移动。此优化旨在通过重新排序图中的节点来增加常量前缀的长度，从而改进前缀共享。它并不严格保留原始计算，因此属于激进优化。例如，将提示从“Here is a question + {question}. Please act as a math expert and solve the given question”改为“Please act as a math expert and solve the given question. Here is a question + {question}.”会产生更长的可共享前缀。这种优化很有趣，因为传统的程序分析无法实现它，原因是 SGLang 中存在自然语言指令。相反，我们提示 GPT-4 重新排序图节点。我们编写了一个包含多个示例的提示，向 GPT-4 传授 SGLang IR 的概念，并发现 GPT-4 可以成功地对一些简单的 SGLang 程序应用此优化。

items.en: Prefetching Annotations. This involves automatically adding prefetching nodes to the graph, signaling the runtime to move the cached KV cache from the CPU to the GPU if the cache exists for a long prompt. This can reduce the latency for pipelines with long prompts.
items.zh: 预取注释。这涉及自动向图中添加预取节点，向运行时发出信号，如果长提示存在缓存，则将缓存的 KV 缓存从 CPU 移动到 GPU。这可以减少长提示管道的延迟。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Examples of RadixAttention operations with an LRU eviction policy, illustrated across nine time points. The figure demonstrates the dynamic evolution of the radix tree in response to various requests. These requests include two chat sessions, a batch of few-shot learning inquiries, and a self-consistency sampling. Each tree edge carries a label denoting a substring or a sequence of tokens. The nodes are color-coded to reflect different states: green for newly added nodes, blue for cached nodes accessed during the time point, and red for nodes that have been evicted. In step (1), the radix tree is initially empty. In step (2), the server processes an incoming user message "Hello" and responds with the LLM output "Hi". The system prompt "You are a helpful assistant", the user message "Hello!", and the LLM reply "Hi!" are consolidated into the tree as a single edge linked to a new node. In step (3), a new prompt arrives and the server finds the prefix of the prompt (i.e., the first turn of the conversation) in the radix tree and reuses its KV cache. The new turn is appended to the tree as a new node. In step (4), a new chat session begins. The node “b” from (3) is split into two nodes to allow the two chat sessions to share the system prompt. In step (5), the second chat session continues. However, due to the memory limit, node "c" from (4) must be evicted. The new turn is appended after node "d" in (4). In step (6), the server receives a few-shot learning query, processes it, and inserts it into the tree. The root node is split because the new query does not share any prefix with existing nodes. In step (7), the server receives a batch of additional few-shot learning queries. These queries share the same set of few-shot examples, so we split node ’e’ from (6) to enable sharing. In step (8), the server receives a new message from the first chat session. It evicts all nodes from the second chat session (node "g" and "h") as they are least recently used. In step (9), the server receives a request to sample more answers for the questions in node "j" from (8), likely for self-consistency prompting. To make space for these requests, we evict node "i", "k", and "l" in (8)."
items.capZh: 图 6：使用 LRU 驱逐策略的 RadixAttention 操作示例，在九个时间点上展示。该图展示了基数树响应各种请求的动态演变。这些请求包括两个聊天会话、一批少样本学习查询和自一致性采样。每条树边都带有一个标签，表示一个子字符串或 token 序列。节点用颜色编码以反映不同状态：绿色表示新添加的节点，蓝色表示在该时间点访问的缓存节点，红色表示已被驱逐的节点。在步骤 (1) 中，基数树最初为空。在步骤 (2) 中，服务器处理传入的用户消息“Hello”并用 LLM 输出“Hi”响应。系统提示“You are a helpful assistant”、用户消息“Hello!”和 LLM 回复“Hi!”被合并到树中，作为连接到新节点的单条边。在步骤 (3) 中，一个新提示到达，服务器在基数树中找到该提示的前缀（即对话的第一轮）并重用其 KV 缓存。新轮次作为新节点附加到树中。在步骤 (4) 中，一个新的聊天会话开始。步骤 (3) 中的节点“b”被拆分为两个节点，以允许两个聊天会话共享系统提示。在步骤 (5) 中，第二个聊天会话继续。然而，由于内存限制，步骤 (4) 中的节点“c”必须被驱逐。新轮次附加到步骤 (4) 中节点“d”之后。在步骤 (6) 中，服务器收到一个少样本学习查询，处理它并将其插入树中。根节点被拆分，因为新查询与现有节点不共享任何前缀。在步骤 (7) 中，服务器收到一批额外的少样本学习查询。这些查询共享同一组少样本示例，因此我们拆分步骤 (6) 中的节点“e”以实现共享。在步骤 (8) 中，服务器收到来自第一个聊天会话的新消息。它驱逐第二个聊天会话中的所有节点（节点“g”和“h”），因为它们最近最少使用。在步骤 (8) 中，服务器收到一个请求，要求对节点“j”中的问题采样更多答案，可能是为了自一致性提示。为了给这些请求腾出空间，我们驱逐步骤 (8) 中的节点“i”、“k”和“l”。

items.en: The primary challenge in optimizing the execution of SGLang programs lies in reusing the KV cache across multiple calls and programs, as discussed in Section 2.3. While some existing systems can handle KV cache reuse in certain scenarios, this often requires manual configurations and ad-hoc adjustments. However, even with manual configurations, no existing system can automatically handle all scenarios due to the variety of possible reuse patterns.
items.zh: 优化 SGLang 程序执行的主要挑战在于跨多个调用和程序重用 KV 缓存，如第 2.3 节所述。虽然一些现有系统可以在某些场景下处理 KV 缓存重用，但这通常需要手动配置和临时调整。然而，即使有手动配置，由于可能的重用模式多种多样，现有系统也无法自动处理所有场景。

items.en: This section introduces RadixAttention, a novel technique for automatic KV cache reuse during runtime. Instead of discarding the KV cache after finishing a generation request, our approach retains the KV cache for both prompts and generation results in a radix tree. This structure enables efficient prefix search, reuse, insertion, and eviction. We implement a Least Recently Used (LRU) eviction policy, complemented by a cache-aware scheduling policy, to enhance the cache hit rate. Furthermore, RadixAttention is compatible with existing techniques like continuous batching and paged attention.
items.zh: 本节介绍 RadixAttention，一种用于运行时自动重用 KV 缓存的新技术。我们的方法不是在完成生成请求后丢弃 KV 缓存，而是将提示和生成结果的 KV 缓存保留在基数树中。这种结构支持高效的前缀搜索、重用、插入和驱逐。我们实现了最近最少使用（LRU）驱逐策略，并辅以缓存感知调度策略，以提高缓存命中率。此外，RadixAttention 与现有技术（如连续批处理和分页注意力）兼容。

items.en: A radix tree is a data structure that serves as a space-efficient alternative to a trie (prefix tree). Unlike typical trees, the edges of a radix tree can be labeled with not just single elements, but also with sequences of elements of varying lengths. This feature significantly boosts the efficiency of radix trees. In our system, we utilize a radix tree to manage a mapping. This mapping is between sequences of tokens, which act as the keys, and their corresponding KV cache tensors, which serve as the values. These KV cache tensors are stored in a non-contiguous, paged layout, where the size of each page is equivalent to one token.
items.zh: 基数树是一种数据结构，作为 trie（前缀树）的空间高效替代方案。与典型树不同，基数树的边不仅可以标记单个元素，还可以标记不同长度的元素序列。这一特性显著提高了基数树的效率。在我们的系统中，我们使用基数树来管理映射。该映射位于 token 序列（作为键）与其对应的 KV 缓存张量（作为值）之间。这些 KV 缓存张量以非连续的分页布局存储，每页大小相当于一个 token。

items.en: Considering the limited capacity of GPU memory, we cannot retrain infinite KV cache tensors, which necessitates an eviction policy. To tackle this, we implement an LRU eviction policy that recursively evicts leaf nodes. In the continuous batching setting, we cannot evict nodes that are being used by the currently running batch. Therefore, each node maintains a reference counter indicating how many running requests are using it. A node is evictable if its reference counter is zero.
items.zh: 考虑到 GPU 内存容量有限，我们无法保留无限的 KV 缓存张量，因此需要驱逐策略。为了解决这个问题，我们实现了一个 LRU 驱逐策略，递归地驱逐叶节点。在连续批处理设置中，我们不能驱逐当前正在运行的批次正在使用的节点。因此，每个节点维护一个引用计数器，指示有多少正在运行的请求正在使用它。如果节点的引用计数器为零，则该节点可被驱逐。

items.en: The front end always sends full prompts to the runtime and the runtime will automatically do prefix matching, reuse, and caching. Figure 6 illustrates how the radix tree is maintained when processing several incoming requests. The tree structure is stored on the CPU and the maintenance overhead is small.
items.zh: 前端始终将完整提示发送给运行时，运行时将自动进行前缀匹配、重用和缓存。图 6 展示了在处理多个传入请求时如何维护基数树。树结构存储在 CPU 上，维护开销很小。

items.en: To increase the cache hit rate, the scheduler must be cache-aware. Otherwise, when a large batch of requests arrives, the scheduler may switch between different requests, leading to cache thrashing. Algorithm 1 presents the algorithm for cache-aware scheduling in RadixAttention with contiguous batching. The key idea is to sort the requests by matched prefix length, as opposed to adhering to a first-come-first-serve schedule. There are further opportunities for the implementation of more advanced scheduling strategies that assign priority based on the weights of subtrees. Essentially, this would involve counting the total number of requests within each sub-tree(prefix-sharing trees) and even considering requests that have been historically evicted. The weighted priority can fully utilize the tree-shape locality of some LLM tasks such as tree-of-thought [70], making the least redundant evictions.
items.zh: 为了提高缓存命中率，调度器必须具有缓存感知能力。否则，当大量请求到达时，调度器可能会在不同请求之间切换，导致缓存抖动。算法 1 展示了在连续批处理下 RadixAttention 的缓存感知调度算法。关键思想是根据匹配的前缀长度对请求进行排序，而不是遵循先到先服务调度。还有机会实现更高级的调度策略，根据子树的权重分配优先级。本质上，这将涉及计算每个子树（前缀共享树）内的请求总数，甚至考虑历史上被驱逐的请求。加权优先级可以充分利用某些 LLM 任务（如思维树 [70]）的树形局部性，从而进行最少冗余的驱逐。

items.en: The development of new CUDA kernels is essential to enhance the efficiency of KV cache reuse. Existing systems mostly implement CUDA kernels for two main functions: prefill and decoding. The prefill kernel assumes that the lengths of the query and key are identical. Conversely, the decode kernel assumes that the query length is one. However, in the case of KV cache reuse, these kernels cannot be directly applied. We introduce a new “extend” kernel for this computation, capable of reading the KV cache from both contiguous buffers and non-contiguous memory pools. This fused extend kernel operates without extra copy overhead.
items.zh: 开发新的 CUDA 内核对于提高 KV 缓存重用的效率至关重要。现有系统主要实现两个主要功能的 CUDA 内核：预填充和解码。预填充内核假设查询和键的长度相同。相反，解码内核假设查询长度为 1。然而，在 KV 缓存重用的情况下，这些内核不能直接应用。我们引入了一个新的“扩展”内核用于此计算，它能够从连续缓冲区和非连续内存池中读取 KV 缓存。这个融合的扩展内核运行时没有额外的复制开销。

items.en: SGLang and SGVM are implemented in approximately 9K lines of Python code. SGVM reuses some components from LightLLM [35], an LLM serving system based on PyTorch [43] and Triton [57].
items.zh: SGLang 和 SGVM 使用约 9K 行 Python 代码实现。SGVM 重用了 LightLLM [35] 的一些组件，LightLLM 是一个基于 PyTorch [43] 和 Triton [57] 的 LLM 服务系统。

items.en: We evaluate the performance of SGLang across a diverse range of LLM workloads. Subsequently, we conduct case studies and ablation studies to demonstrate the effectiveness of specific components.
items.zh: 我们在各种 LLM 工作负载上评估 SGLang 的性能。随后，我们进行案例研究和消融研究，以证明特定组件的有效性。

items.en: Models. We test the Llama 2 chat models [58], CodeLlama models [47], and vision language model LLaVA [29] models of various sizes. The number of parameters ranges from 7B to 33B. We use float16 precision for Llama and CodeLlama models, and 4-bit quantized precision for LLaVA models.
items.zh: 模型。我们测试了不同大小的 Llama 2 聊天模型 [58]、CodeLlama 模型 [47] 和视觉语言模型 LLaVA [29]。参数数量从 7B 到 33B 不等。我们对 Llama 和 CodeLlama 模型使用 float16 精度，对 LLaVA 模型使用 4 位量化精度。

items.en: Hardware. Most experiments are conducted on AWS EC2 G5 instances unless otherwise stated. The GPUs on G5 instances are NVIDIA A10G GPUs, each with 24 GB of memory. The CPUs are AMD EPYC processors. For most experiments, we run 7B models with a single A10G GPU. To see how our system handles larger models, we also test a 33B model on an A100 GPU (80GB).
items.zh: 硬件。除非另有说明，大多数实验在 AWS EC2 G5 实例上进行。G5 实例上的 GPU 是 NVIDIA A10G GPU，每个具有 24 GB 内存。CPU 是 AMD EPYC 处理器。对于大多数实验，我们使用单个 A10G GPU 运行 7B 模型。为了了解我们的系统如何处理更大的模型，我们还在 A100 GPU（80GB）上测试了 33B 模型。

items.en: Baseline. We compare SGLang against both high-level programming systems with their respective languages and default runtimes, as well as low-level inference engines with standard OpenAI-like Completion APIs. The baselines include:
items.zh: 基线。我们将 SGLang 与具有各自语言和默认运行时的高级编程系统，以及具有标准 OpenAI 类 Completion API 的低级推理引擎进行比较。基线包括：

items.en: Guidance [16], a language for controlling LLMs. We use Guidance v0.1.4 with the llama.cpp backend.
items.zh: Guidance [16]，一种用于控制 LLM 的语言。我们使用带有 llama.cpp 后端的 Guidance v0.1.4。

items.en: LMQL [4], a query language for LLMs. We use LMQL v0.7.3 with the Hugging Face Transformers backend.
items.zh: LMQL [4]，一种用于大语言模型的查询语言。我们使用 LMQL v0.7.3 搭配 Hugging Face Transformers 后端。

items.en: vLLM [23], a high-throughput inference engine. We use vLLM v0.2.2 and its default API server.
items.zh: vLLM [23]，一个高吞吐量推理引擎。我们使用 vLLM v0.2.2 及其默认 API 服务器。

items.en: Metrics. We report two performance metrics: throughput and latency. For throughput, we run a sufficiently large batch of program instances to compute the maximum throughput, comparing the number of program instances executed per second (programs per second, p/s). For latency, we execute a single program at a time without batching and report the average latency for multiple instances. Unless otherwise stated, most of our optimizations do not change the computation results.
items.zh: 指标。我们报告两个性能指标：吞吐量和延迟。对于吞吐量，我们运行足够大的程序实例批次来计算最大吞吐量，比较每秒执行的程序实例数（程序数/秒，p/s）。对于延迟，我们一次执行单个程序而不进行批处理，并报告多个实例的平均延迟。除非另有说明，我们的多数优化不会改变计算结果。

items.en: While our primary focus is on runtime efficiency, we also conduct several case studies to compare the number of lines of code for productivity.
items.zh: 虽然我们的主要关注点是运行时效率，但我们也进行了几个案例研究，以比较代码行数，从而评估生产力。

items.en: We start with the most basic few-shot learning prompting. We evaluate the maximum throughput of systems during batch processing of few-shot learning requests using three benchmarks, each with 5 shots. Results are shown in Figure 7.
items.zh: 我们从最基本的少样本学习提示开始。我们使用三个基准测试，每个基准测试包含 5 个样本，评估系统在批量处理少样本学习请求时的最大吞吐量。结果如图 7 所示。

items.en: MMLU [18] is a multi-choice knowledge benchmark where the LLM outputs a single token (A/B/C/D) for answer selection. LMQL exhibits the worst performance due to its slow backend and complex pre- and post-processing. Guidance, being faster than LMQL, benefits from reduced processing overhead and some KV cache reuse. However, both systems support only a batch size of one. vLLM performs similarly to Guidance, but it lacks automatic KV cache reuse for the shared prefix. Although the vLLM paper discusses this feature, the released code does not support it due to the absence of a reliable high-performance kernel. Even if a high-performance kernel is implemented for vLLM, manual configuration is required to use this feature. Conversely, SGLang automatically achieves sharing with RadixAttention and attains a throughput that is 4.4×4.4\times higher than its closest competitor.
items.zh: MMLU [18] 是一个多项选择知识基准测试，其中 LLM 输出单个词元（A/B/C/D）用于答案选择。LMQL 由于其后端缓慢以及复杂的前后处理，表现最差。Guidance 比 LMQL 快，得益于减少的处理开销和一些 KV 缓存重用。然而，这两个系统都只支持批次大小为 1。vLLM 的性能与 Guidance 相似，但它缺乏对共享前缀的自动 KV 缓存重用。尽管 vLLM 论文讨论了这一特性，但由于缺乏可靠的高性能内核，发布的代码并不支持该特性。即使为 vLLM 实现了高性能内核，也需要手动配置才能使用该特性。相反，SGLang 通过 RadixAttention 自动实现共享，其吞吐量比最接近的竞争对手高 4.4 倍。

items.en: HellaSwag [76] is a multi-choice benchmark where each option is a short string. Unlike MMLU, which decodes a single output token, HellaSwag requires an LLM to calculate the probability of each string choice by performing a forward pass. LMQL exhibits slowness due to high overhead. vLLM lacks a “select” primitive. Instead, it concatenates each choice with the prompt and computes the probability for the entire concatenated prompt for all choices, leading to redundant calculations. Guidance, although offering a “select” feature, is limited to a batch size of 1. SGLang outperforms others by 2×2\times with automatic KV cache sharing and batching.
items.zh: HellaSwag [76] 是一个多项选择基准测试，其中每个选项是一个短字符串。与解码单个输出词元的 MMLU 不同，HellaSwag 要求 LLM 通过前向传播计算每个字符串选择的概率。LMQL 由于高开销而表现缓慢。vLLM 缺少“select”原语。相反，它将每个选择与提示拼接，并为所有选择计算整个拼接提示的概率，导致冗余计算。Guidance 虽然提供了“select”功能，但批次大小限制为 1。SGLang 通过自动 KV 缓存共享和批处理，性能比其他系统高出 2 倍。

items.en: GSM-8K [9] is a benchmark that requires LLMs to generate a reasoning process and produce an integer answer. Since the benchmark demands longer output lengths, batching is crucial for enhanced throughput. However, LMQL and guidance currently lack support for batching, leading to reduced performance. vLLM is also slow due to its inability to reuse the KV cache for the shared prefix. In contrast, SGLang achieves a 4.5×4.5\times increase in throughput, thanks to the integration of RadixAttention and contiguous batching.
items.zh: GSM-8K [9] 是一个要求 LLM 生成推理过程并输出整数答案的基准测试。由于该基准测试需要较长的输出长度，批处理对于提高吞吐量至关重要。然而，LMQL 和 Guidance 目前不支持批处理，导致性能下降。vLLM 也因无法重用共享前缀的 KV 缓存而速度较慢。相比之下，SGLang 通过集成 RadixAttention 和连续批处理，实现了 4.5 倍的吞吐量提升。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Throughput on few-shot in-context learning tasks.
items.capZh: 图 7：少样本上下文学习任务的吞吐量。

items.en: Due to its overhead, LMQL often performs significantly worse than other systems in both short and long-generation tasks, so we will not include it in our future benchmarks.
items.zh: 由于其开销，LMQL 在短生成和长生成任务中的表现通常远逊于其他系统，因此我们将在未来的基准测试中不再包含它。

items.en: We benchmark on two highly regarded agent frameworks: ReAct agent [71], which processes tasks in an interleaved manner by chaining multiple LLM calls with actions like web search; and generative agents [42], employed in a gaming environment where agents interact with each other and make decisions by invoking LLMs. Both original papers utilized OpenAI models. To accurately gauge potential performance gains, we mirrored the settings described in the papers and used GPT-3.5-turbo as the backbone model, and then traced the input and output of LLM calls to create a dataset. For ReAct agents, we used the HotpotQA [69] evaluation as reported in the paper. For generative agents, we rewrote the top five functions (out of forty traced) from the game using SGLang, which accounts for approximately 70% of all LLM calls. We then replayed these traces on our experimental platform.
items.zh: 我们在两个备受推崇的智能体框架上进行基准测试：ReAct 智能体 [71]，它通过将多个 LLM 调用与网页搜索等操作链式连接，以交错方式处理任务；以及生成式智能体 [42]，用于游戏环境中，智能体之间相互交互并通过调用 LLM 做出决策。两篇原始论文均使用 OpenAI 模型。为了准确衡量潜在的性能提升，我们复制了论文中描述的设置，使用 GPT-3.5-turbo 作为骨干模型，然后跟踪 LLM 调用的输入和输出以创建数据集。对于 ReAct 智能体，我们使用了论文中报告的 HotpotQA [69] 评估。对于生成式智能体，我们使用 SGLang 重写了游戏中跟踪的四十个函数中的前五个，这些函数约占所有 LLM 调用的 70%。然后我们在实验平台上重放了这些跟踪。

items.en: As depicted in Figure 8, the ReAct agent, using SGLang, achieves a throughput that is 5.6×5.6\times higher than that of vLLM and has only 13%percent1313\% of its latency. This improvement primarily results from the agent’s process of appending current states (thoughts, actions, and observations) to the prompt for subsequent LLM calls. Our RadixAttention mechanism effectively identifies and minimizes redundant computations, a capability not present in the current inference engines. This mechanism also significantly reduces memory usage, allowing more questions to be addressed by a greater number of agents, thereby optimizing GPU utilization and enhancing throughput.
items.zh: 如图 8 所示，使用 SGLang 的 ReAct 智能体实现的吞吐量是 vLLM 的 5.6 倍，延迟仅为 vLLM 的 13%。这一改进主要源于智能体将当前状态（思考、行动和观察）附加到提示中以供后续 LLM 调用的过程。我们的 RadixAttention 机制有效识别并最小化冗余计算，这是当前推理引擎所不具备的能力。该机制还显著减少了内存使用，允许更多问题由更多智能体处理，从而优化 GPU 利用率并提高吞吐量。

items.en: In the case of the generative agent task, the gaming setting’s constraints permit only a single LLM call per simulation to maintain game logic consistency. In this case, SGLang still outperforms vLLM by 30% in both throughput and latency. This efficiency is due to the caching of agents’ predefined routines, reducing redundant computations. The task prompt templates contain multiple arguments that vary at different speeds based on timestamps, resulting in complex prefix reuse patterns. Nevertheless, the SGLang runtime can automatically detect these patterns and reuse the KV cache.
items.zh: 在生成式智能体任务中，游戏环境的限制允许每次模拟仅进行一次 LLM 调用以保持游戏逻辑一致性。在这种情况下，SGLang 在吞吐量和延迟方面仍比 vLLM 高出 30%。这种效率归因于对智能体预定义例程的缓存，减少了冗余计算。任务提示模板包含多个参数，这些参数根据时间戳以不同速度变化，导致复杂的前缀重用模式。尽管如此，SGLang 运行时可以自动检测这些模式并重用 KV 缓存。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Throughput and latency on agent tasks.
items.capZh: 图 8：智能体任务的吞吐量和延迟。

items.capEn: Figure 9: (a) Throughput on reasoning tasks. (b) Latency on reasoning tasks. (c) Throughput on content generation tasks. (d) Latency on content generation tasks. (e) Throughput on long-context tasks.
items.capZh: 图 9：(a) 推理任务的吞吐量。(b) 推理任务的延迟。(c) 内容生成任务的吞吐量。(d) 内容生成任务的延迟。(e) 长上下文任务的吞吐量。

items.en: We benchmark the performance of systems using advanced prompting techniques for reasoning tasks. These tasks involve solving GSM-8K problems in a zero-shot setting. Both throughput and latency metrics are reported in Figure 9 (a)(b).
items.zh: 我们使用高级提示技术对系统在推理任务上的性能进行基准测试。这些任务涉及在零样本设置下解决 GSM-8K 问题。吞吐量和延迟指标均在图 9 (a)(b) 中报告。

items.en: Multi-chain reasoning [73] involves generating several solutions to one question and using meta-reasoning across these solutions for the final answer. This process allows for sharing the question and parallelizing the generation of multiple solutions. For each solution generation, we use various eliciting prompts such as "Think step-by-step" and "Take a deep breath". Unlike simple parallel sampling, this flexible approach with different eliciting prompts is not supported by the vLLM API. Hence, vLLM exhibits lower throughput due to its inability to share prefixes flexibly. Guidance has lower throughput due to no batching. In contrast, SGLang allows users to intuitively implement this technique without worrying about manual optimizations, yet achieve high throughput. The improvement in throughput is not as substantial as in previous cases of few-shot learning, due to the zero-shot setting having a shorter shareable prefix.
items.zh: 多链推理 [73] 涉及为一个问题生成多个解决方案，并使用跨这些解决方案的元推理得出最终答案。此过程允许共享问题并并行生成多个解决方案。对于每个解决方案的生成，我们使用各种启发式提示，例如“逐步思考”和“深呼吸”。与简单的并行采样不同，这种使用不同启发式提示的灵活方法不受 vLLM API 支持。因此，vLLM 由于无法灵活共享前缀而表现出较低的吞吐量。Guidance 由于没有批处理而吞吐量较低。相比之下，SGLang 允许用户直观地实现这种技术，无需担心手动优化，同时实现高吞吐量。吞吐量的提升不如之前的少样本学习案例显著，因为零样本设置的可共享前缀较短。

items.en: Regarding latency, the SGLang interpreter can automatically resolve dependencies and submit requests in parallel. For a fair comparison, we directly translate the SGLang program into an equivalent Python program without explicitly using threading or asyncio to avoid added complexity. Consequently, the translated program does not parallelize parallelizable requests, resulting in higher latency.
items.zh: 关于延迟，SGLang 解释器可以自动解析依赖关系并并行提交请求。为了公平比较，我们直接将 SGLang 程序翻译成等效的 Python 程序，而不显式使用线程或 asyncio 以避免增加复杂性。因此，翻译后的程序不会并行化可并行的请求，导致更高的延迟。

items.en: Tree-of-thought [70] incorporates LLMs into the breadth-first tree-search algorithm. The LLMs must propose the next steps for branch exploration, execute these proposals, and evaluate the solutions. This method leads to complex sharing patterns beyond the capabilities of existing systems. Once again, SGLang surpasses others in terms of both higher throughput and lower latency in this benchmark.
items.zh: 思维树 [70] 将 LLM 融入广度优先树搜索算法中。LLM 必须为分支探索提出下一步，执行这些提议，并评估解决方案。这种方法导致复杂的共享模式，超出了现有系统的能力。在此基准测试中，SGLang 再次在更高吞吐量和更低延迟方面超越其他系统。

items.en: We evaluate two advanced prompting methods for content generation: tip generation and article review. The skeleton-of-thought technique [37] first creates a brief outline of tips, then elaborates each into a detailed paragraph. The branch-solve-merge approach [48] assesses an article from multiple dimensions and then assigns a final grade. Results are shown in Figure 9 (c)(d). In both cases, there are opportunities for sharing and intra-program parallelism. SGLang systematically exploits them through an intuitive programming model, achieving higher throughput and reduced latency.
items.zh: 我们评估了两种用于内容生成的高级提示方法：提示生成和文章评审。思维骨架技术 [37] 首先创建提示的简要大纲，然后将每个提示详细阐述为一段。分支-求解-合并方法 [48] 从多个维度评估一篇文章，然后给出最终评分。结果如图 9 (c)(d) 所示。在这两种情况下，都存在共享和程序内并行的机会。SGLang 通过直观的编程模型系统地利用这些机会，实现了更高的吞吐量和更低的延迟。

items.en: We benchmark the performance on long document processing tasks. When the document is long, KV cache reuse becomes more important as the forward pass to encode the prompt becomes significantly longer. We use CodeLlama models, which were fine-tuned on a context length of 16K tokens. On our setup, running a 7B model in fp16 precision on a 24 GB GPU, we can store at most 15K tokens. We select inputs exceeding 10K tokens in length, meaning the system can process only one request at a time at most. The first benchmark tests answering questions using multiple document segments from a paper, akin to a retrieval augmented generation setup. The second benchmark involves summarizing a city’s information from its Wikipedia page and outputting a JSON object.
items.zh: 我们在长文档处理任务上对性能进行了基准测试。当文档较长时，KV缓存重用变得更加重要，因为编码提示的前向传播会显著变长。我们使用了CodeLlama模型，这些模型在16K令牌的上下文长度上进行了微调。在我们的设置中，在24 GB GPU上以fp16精度运行7B模型时，最多只能存储15K个令牌。我们选择了长度超过10K令牌的输入，这意味着系统一次最多只能处理一个请求。第一个基准测试是使用论文中的多个文档片段来回答问题，类似于检索增强生成设置。第二个基准测试涉及从维基百科页面总结一个城市的信息，并输出一个JSON对象。

items.en: For the first benchmark, we employ the fork/join primitives in SGLang to implement parallel-context window [46]. By using this technique, we can encode multiple documents separately in parallel and concatenate the resulting KV cache, without letting them attend to each other. This approach reduces the quadratic computational cost of self-attention for long prompts. While this optimization alters the computation, it does not negatively impact accuracy in our benchmark. For the second benchmark, we reuse the KV cache of the long prompts when decoding multiple fields of the JSON object. The results are shown in Figure 9 (e). SGLang achieves 1.2× and 2.9× improvement on these two benchmarks, respectively. Since the maximum batch size is one, latency improvements are the same as throughput improvements.
items.zh: 对于第一个基准测试，我们在SGLang中使用fork/join原语实现了并行上下文窗口[46]。通过使用这种技术，我们可以并行地分别编码多个文档，并连接生成的KV缓存，而不让它们相互关注。这种方法减少了长提示的自注意力的二次计算成本。虽然这种优化改变了计算方式，但在我们的基准测试中并未对准确性产生负面影响。对于第二个基准测试，我们在解码JSON对象的多个字段时重用了长提示的KV缓存。结果如图9(e)所示。SGLang在这两个基准测试上分别实现了1.2倍和2.9倍的改进。由于最大批处理大小为1，延迟改进与吞吐量改进相同。

items.en: We conduct a case study to demonstrate the extensibility of SGLang by supporting a new vision language model, LLaVA v1.5 [29], on a new hardware platform, Apple Silicon. To achieve this, we add a new primitive, sgl.image, to accept image inputs, and incorporate a new backend, llama.cpp [15], an inference engine compatible with a wide range of hardware.
items.zh: 我们进行了一个案例研究，通过在新的硬件平台Apple Silicon上支持新的视觉语言模型LLaVA v1.5[29]，来展示SGLang的可扩展性。为此，我们添加了一个新的原语sgl.image来接受图像输入，并集成了一个新的后端llama.cpp[15]，这是一个兼容多种硬件的推理引擎。

items.en: We integrate sgl.image as a new IR node into the interpreter and reuse the SGVM protocol to build a server based on llama.cpp. This integration is achieved in around 400 lines of code. Additionally, the code that uses sgl.image can be executed on GPT-4 Vision through the OpenAI back-end without code modification. We create a cache for image tokens based on the image’s hash ID, similar to how we maintain RadixAttention. We run the LLaVA-Bench and report the throughput using SGLang and the default llama.cpp server on an M2 Ultra. The LLaVA-Bench contains a total of 24 images and 60 questions, with 2.5 questions on each image on average. SGLang increases the throughput of llama.cpp by 1.7×\times. The speedup is mainly affected by the number of questions per shared image and the output length.
items.zh: 我们将sgl.image作为新的IR节点集成到解释器中，并重用SGVM协议来构建基于llama.cpp的服务器。这个集成大约用了400行代码。此外，使用sgl.image的代码可以通过OpenAI后端在GPT-4 Vision上执行，无需修改代码。我们基于图像的哈希ID为图像令牌创建了一个缓存，类似于我们维护RadixAttention的方式。我们在M2 Ultra上运行了LLaVA-Bench，并报告了使用SGLang和默认llama.cpp服务器的吞吐量。LLaVA-Bench总共包含24张图像和60个问题，平均每张图像2.5个问题。SGLang将llama.cpp的吞吐量提高了1.7倍。加速主要受每张共享图像的问题数量和输出长度的影响。

items.en: We evaluate the effectiveness of two compiler optimizations. The first is GPT-4-assisted code movement for prefix sharing. We collect 20 prompt templates from the internet and implement them in SGLang. We utilize 5 of these templates for few-shot training examples and the remaining 15 as test cases. Our evaluation shows that, for 12 out of the 15 templates, GPT-4 successfully reorders the graph nodes without altering the semantics, as confirmed by manual inspection of the modified prompts. On average, this optimization results in a 60-token increase in the sharable prefix length, showcasing GPT-4’s effectiveness. Failures in creating optimized prompt order come from an incorrect understanding of the semantic meaning behind the graph nodes. It is too aggressive and puts all constants upfront even when such ordering changes the original semantics. This case study aims to explore the use of GPT-4 for compiler optimizations. More work is needed to make these kinds of optimizations reliable in the future.
items.zh: 我们评估了两种编译器优化的有效性。第一种是GPT-4辅助的代码移动以实现前缀共享。我们从互联网收集了20个提示模板，并在SGLang中实现。我们使用了其中5个模板作为少样本训练示例，其余15个作为测试用例。我们的评估显示，在15个模板中，有12个模板的GPT-4成功重新排序了图节点而没有改变语义，这一点通过手动检查修改后的提示得到了确认。平均而言，这种优化使可共享前缀长度增加了60个令牌，展示了GPT-4的有效性。创建优化提示顺序的失败源于对图节点背后语义含义的错误理解。它过于激进，将所有常量放在前面，即使这种顺序改变了原始语义。这个案例研究旨在探索使用GPT-4进行编译器优化。未来需要更多工作来使这类优化变得可靠。

items.en: The second optimization involves prefetching annotation insertion. For frequently used long prompts, we cache them in CPU memory. The compiler automatically inserts prefetch nodes into the computational graph. During runtime, when the server encounters a prefetch node, it evicts nodes from the radix tree and swaps in the cached prefix. As the cost of swapping can be substantially overlapped, this reduces the first-token latency of the subsequent request. We test SGLang programs that contain function calls with a 444k prefix length. By prefetching the 444k prefix, the first token latency of the called function has been reduced from 1 second to 0.2 seconds, which is a 80% reduction.
items.zh: 第二种优化涉及预取注释插入。对于频繁使用的长提示，我们将其缓存在CPU内存中。编译器自动将预取节点插入计算图中。在运行时，当服务器遇到预取节点时，它会从基数树中驱逐节点并换入缓存的前缀。由于交换的成本可以大幅重叠，这减少了后续请求的首令牌延迟。我们测试了包含函数调用的SGLang程序，前缀长度为444k。通过预取444k前缀，被调用函数的首令牌延迟从1秒减少到0.2秒，减少了80%。

items.en: We conducted a case study to demonstrate SGLang’s productivity improvement by comparing its Lines of Code (LoC) with OpenAI APIs. We designed a prompting flow for article analysis: if it’s about a celebrity, the program generates a bio and introduction; otherwise, it summarizes the article. Implementing this flow in both OpenAI APIs and SGLang, we counted effective LoC, excluding comments and empty lines. The results show the OpenAI API required 206 lines, while SGLang needed only 91, marking a 55% reduction.
items.zh: 我们进行了一个案例研究，通过比较SGLang与OpenAI API的代码行数（LoC）来展示SGLang的生产力提升。我们设计了一个用于文章分析的提示流程：如果是关于名人的，程序生成传记和介绍；否则，总结文章。在OpenAI API和SGLang中实现这个流程，我们统计了有效的代码行数，排除了注释和空行。结果显示，OpenAI API需要206行，而SGLang只需要91行，减少了55%。

items.en: We delve into the implementations and summarize the insights regarding why SGLang is capable of using fewer LoC. First, whereas users must manually extract content from OpenAI API responses and chain them to form a multi-step flow, SGLang simplifies this process by leveraging the string concatenation operator. Second, since the flow involves several calls with restricted answers, such as true/false and integers, users are required to construct an appropriate logit bias to ensure OpenAI returns one of the expected answers. In contrast, SGLang provides primitives that automatically construct logit bias for this purpose, allowing users to merely specify the acceptable data type and choices. Third, in cases where skeleton-based prompting is used to reduce end-to-end latency, OpenAI API users need to initiate a thread pool for parallel request submission explicitly. However, SGLang’s built-in primitive fork automatically parallelizes requests.
items.zh: 我们深入探讨了实现细节，并总结了SGLang为何能够使用更少代码行数的见解。首先，用户必须手动从OpenAI API响应中提取内容并将其链接以形成多步流程，而SGLang通过利用字符串连接运算符简化了这一过程。其次，由于流程涉及多个具有受限答案的调用，例如真/假和整数，用户需要构建适当的logit偏置以确保OpenAI返回预期的答案之一。相比之下，SGLang提供了自动为此构建logit偏置的原语，用户只需指定可接受的数据类型和选项。第三，在使用骨架提示来减少端到端延迟的情况下，OpenAI API用户需要显式启动线程池进行并行请求提交。然而，SGLang的内置原语fork自动并行化请求。

items.en: While most of our experiments are conducted using a 7B model, our techniques also perform effectively on larger models. We test a 13B model on an A100 (40GB) and a 33B model on an A100 (80GB) using the ReAct agent benchmark, achieving a similar speedup (5×5\times).
items.zh: 虽然我们的大多数实验使用7B模型进行，但我们的技术在大模型上也同样有效。我们在A100（40GB）上测试了13B模型，在A100（80GB）上使用ReAct智能体基准测试了33B模型，实现了类似的加速（5倍）。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Performance of different scheduling policies.
items.capZh: 图10：不同调度策略的性能。

items.en: We evaluate the effectiveness of our cache-aware scheduling by comparing it with several other policies. The results are shown in Figure 10. “LMP”, or longest matching prefix, is the default policy outlined in Section 5.2. “Random” employs a random order. “FCFS” adheres to a first-come-first-serve policy. “No interpreter help” omits the prefix hints from the interpreter, which is explained in detail below. Although RadixAttention can automatically detect shared prefixes, our runtime implementation is simplified: we only compare a pending request with the existing cache tree. We do not construct a tree index for all requests in the waiting queue. This approach may lead to suboptimal performance when there is a large batch of pending requests that share a prefix but have yet to be processed and inserted into the tree. To mitigate this, we use the interpreter to help with the scheduling. When the interpreter identifies a highly likely shared prefix (e.g., during a fork), it issues a forward request for this prefix first and stores it in the tree, and then it sends out the requests that can reuse the prefix. This method leverages hints from the interpreter to lessen the load on backend scheduling, underscoring the benefits of our co-design strategy. As depicted in Figure 10, “LPM” exhibits superior performance, while other policies struggle with a lower cache hit rate and reduced throughput. All policies perform similarly for simple tasks like MMLU.
items.zh: 我们通过与其他几种策略比较来评估缓存感知调度的有效性。结果如图10所示。“LMP”（最长匹配前缀）是第5.2节中概述的默认策略。“随机”采用随机顺序。“FCFS”遵循先来先服务策略。“无解释器帮助”省略了解释器的前缀提示，下面将详细解释。尽管RadixAttention可以自动检测共享前缀，但我们的运行时实现是简化的：我们只将待处理请求与现有缓存树进行比较。我们没有为等待队列中的所有请求构建树索引。当有一大批待处理请求共享一个前缀但尚未被处理并插入树中时，这种方法可能导致次优性能。为了缓解这个问题，我们使用解释器来帮助调度。当解释器识别出高度可能的共享前缀时（例如，在fork期间），它首先发出该前缀的前向请求并将其存储在树中，然后发出可以重用该前缀的请求。这种方法利用了解释器的提示来减轻后端调度的负担，突显了我们协同设计策略的优势。如图10所示，“LPM”表现出优越的性能，而其他策略则面临较低的缓存命中率和较低的吞吐量。所有策略在简单任务（如MMLU）上表现相似。

items.en: We study the effectiveness of optimizations by disabling each one individually. Figure 11 illustrates the results. “No Extend Kernel” disables our optimized kernel, leading to degraded performance, particularly in long-context tasks. “No Interpreter Parallelism” turns off intra-program parallelism, resulting in reduced parallelism and cache locality. “No Cache” deactivates the cache, significantly deteriorating throughput across all benchmarks. “No Radix Tree” uses a list instead of a tree to manage the cache, leading to increased memory usage and copy overhead, and consequently, lower performance.
items.zh: 我们通过单独禁用每个优化来研究其有效性。图11展示了结果。“无扩展内核”禁用了我们优化的内核，导致性能下降，特别是在长上下文任务中。“无解释器并行性”关闭了程序内并行性，导致并行性和缓存局部性降低。“无缓存”停用了缓存，显著降低了所有基准测试的吞吐量。“无基数树”使用列表而不是树来管理缓存，导致内存使用和复制开销增加，从而性能降低。

items.en: We study how the improvement of prefix sharing is influenced by different parameters, including the lengths of shareable and unshareable inputs, and sharing structure configurations.
items.zh: 我们研究了前缀共享的改进如何受不同参数的影响，包括可共享和不可共享输入的长度，以及共享结构配置。

items.en: As shown in Figure 12, in the left subfigure, we establish a base setting with a shareable input length of 256, an unshareable input length of 256, and an output length of 256. We then gradually increase either the shareable input length or the unshareable length and observe the changes in throughput. The results demonstrate that the RadixAttention cache significantly enhances throughput compared to the “No Cache” scenario, with more notable improvements observed when the shareable length is longer.
items.zh: 如图12所示，在左子图中，我们建立了一个基础设置，可共享输入长度为256，不可共享输入长度为256，输出长度为256。然后我们逐渐增加可共享输入长度或不可共享长度，并观察吞吐量的变化。结果表明，与“无缓存”场景相比，RadixAttention缓存显著提高了吞吐量，当可共享长度更长时，改进更为显著。

items.en: In the right subfigure, we set a base scenario with 5 articles and 2 questions per article, where the article comprises 1000 tokens and each question 256 tokens. There are 5×2=1052105\times 2=10 requests in this base setting, with each article being shared by two questions. Subsequently, we increment either the number of articles or the number of questions per article. The findings indicate that the RadixAttention cache exhibits superior performance when the number of questions per article increases, as this creates more opportunities for sharing.
items.zh: 在右子图中，我们设置了一个基础场景，有5篇文章，每篇文章2个问题，其中文章包含1000个令牌，每个问题256个令牌。在这个基础设置中，有5×2=10个请求，每篇文章被两个问题共享。随后，我们增加文章数量或每篇文章的问题数量。结果表明，当每篇文章的问题数量增加时，RadixAttention缓存表现出更优越的性能，因为这创造了更多的共享机会。

items.en: We analyze the overhead of maintaining the radix tree at runtime. The tree structure is maintained on the CPU. In a typical scenario, which has a shareable input length of 256, an unshareable input length of 256, and 128 requests (organized into 16 subtrees, with 8 branches for each subtree), the forward pass in our setup takes 17.6 seconds. Meanwhile, the tree operation only takes 0.07 seconds. We also construct a request trace with no cache hits and observe the tree maintenance incurs only a 0.5% overhead. Therefore, the overhead is negligible. Furthermore, the overhead of tree maintenance can be further reduced by using a high-performance C++ implementation and by overlapping CPU and GPU operations.
items.zh: 我们分析了运行时维护基数树的开销。树结构在CPU上维护。在一个典型场景中，可共享输入长度为256，不可共享输入长度为256，128个请求（组织成16个子树，每个子树有8个分支），我们的设置中的前向传播需要17.6秒。而树操作仅需0.07秒。我们还构建了一个没有缓存命中的请求轨迹，观察到树维护仅产生0.5%的开销。因此，开销可以忽略不计。此外，树维护的开销可以通过使用高性能C++实现以及重叠CPU和GPU操作进一步减少。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Improvements under Different Sharing Settings
items.capZh: 图12：不同共享设置下的改进

items.en: Here are SGLang’s limitations and future development plans:
items.zh: 以下是SGLang的局限性和未来发展计划：

items.en: Our interpreter runs arbitrary Python code, but the tracing and compiler lack support for data-dependent control flows. Introducing new control flow nodes to the SGLang IR, similar to TensorFlow’s dynamic flow [75], is required to address this.
items.zh: 我们的解释器运行任意Python代码，但追踪和编译器缺乏对数据依赖控制流的支持。需要向SGLang IR引入新的控制流节点，类似于TensorFlow的动态流[75]，以解决这个问题。

items.en: The current tokenization algorithm may create artifacts at prompt and generation boundaries. Implementing the token healing technique [16] could resolve this.
items.zh: 当前的 token 化算法可能会在提示和生成边界处产生伪影。实现 token 修复技术 [16] 可以解决此问题。

items.en: We have not yet implemented grammar-constrained decoding. Efficient implementation would necessitate techniques from [65, 22] and careful batching.
items.zh: 我们尚未实现语法约束解码。高效实现需要采用 [65, 22] 中的技术并仔细进行批处理。

items.en: Plans include integrating more input and output modalities, such as incorporating text-to-image models into SGLang and exploring audio and video capabilities.
items.zh: 计划包括集成更多输入和输出模态，例如将文本到图像模型整合到 SGLang 中，并探索音频和视频能力。

items.en: The trend in programming LLM includes the development of better prompting techniques [64, 37, 70, 3], tools usage [49, 50, 44], agent frameworks [67, 54, 71, 53, 27, 41, 42], and programming systems [4, 16, 24, 21, 30, 65]. Among these, Guidance and LMQL are the most similar to our work. We discuss the differences between SGLang and existing LLM programming systems in Section 2.4 and evaluate their performance in Section 6. In short, the co-design approach of SGLang significantly enhances execution efficiency.
items.zh: LLM 编程的趋势包括开发更好的提示技术 [64, 37, 70, 3]、工具使用 [49, 50, 44]、智能体框架 [67, 54, 71, 53, 27, 41, 42] 以及编程系统 [4, 16, 24, 21, 30, 65]。其中，Guidance 和 LMQL 与我们的工作最为相似。我们在第 2.4 节讨论了 SGLang 与现有 LLM 编程系统的差异，并在第 6 节评估了它们的性能。简而言之，SGLang 的协同设计方法显著提升了执行效率。

items.en: Common inference optimizations for LLMs include batching [74], memory optimizations [52, 23, 2], GPU kernel optimizations [10], model parallelism [45], parameter sharing [51], speculative execution [56, 25, 34], scheduling [66, 17], caching [55], quantization [68, 28, 11, 14], and sparsification [13]. These optimizations are complementary to our work and can be, or have already been, integrated into our backend.
items.zh: LLM 的常见推理优化包括批处理 [74]、内存优化 [52, 23, 2]、GPU 内核优化 [10]、模型并行 [45]、参数共享 [51]、推测执行 [56, 25, 34]、调度 [66, 17]、缓存 [55]、量化 [68, 28, 11, 14] 和稀疏化 [13]。这些优化与我们的工作互补，并且可以或已经集成到我们的后端中。

items.en: Various domain-specific compilers for machine learning have been developed. These compilers are capable of optimizing a single tensor operator [7, 12, 77, 33, 57, 72, 62], a computational graph [20, 59], a distributed computation graph [78, 32], and classical algorithms [36]. Distinct from these more general-purpose or low-level compilers, SGLang is specifically designed for LLM applications and incorporates LLM-specific optimizations.
items.zh: 已经开发了多种针对机器学习的领域特定编译器。这些编译器能够优化单个张量算子 [7, 12, 77, 33, 57, 72, 62]、计算图 [20, 59]、分布式计算图 [78, 32] 以及经典算法 [36]。与这些更通用或底层的编译器不同，SGLang 专门为 LLM 应用设计，并融入了 LLM 特定的优化。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce SGLang, an efficient programming system for LLMs. SGLang greatly accelerates common LLM workloads by up to 5×5\times with reduced code complexity and improved control. Through the co-design of the language and runtime, we aim to present a more integrated approach to optimizing LLM programming paradigms.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 SGLang，一个高效的 LLM 编程系统。SGLang 通过减少代码复杂性和改进控制，将常见 LLM 工作负载的速度提升高达 5 倍。通过语言和运行时的协同设计，我们旨在提出一种更集成的方法来优化 LLM 编程范式。
